encounter.reason: 3-month leflunomide efficacy assessment for rheumatoid arthritis
encounter.location: South Texas Rheumatology, San Antonio, TX

vitals.name: body weight
vitals.note: Self-reported during telemedicine visit; not measured in clinic

labs.name: C-reactive protein
labs.note: Modestly improved from prior value of 2.8 mg/dL

screening.name: HAQ-DI
screening.interpretation: moderate functional impairment, slight improvement from 1.3

screening.name: patient global assessment of disease activity
grip strength — right hand
screening.note: Self-reported using home dynamometer; declining from earlier measurements, concerning for progressive functional loss

screening.name: grip strength — left hand
screening.note: Self-reported using home dynamometer; declining from earlier measurements, concerning for progressive functional loss

medications.name: leflunomide 20 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 20 mg tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: naproxen 500 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 500 mg tablet by mouth twice daily as needed for joint pain

medications.name: folic acid 1 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 1 mg tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: cetirizine 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 10 mg tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: omeprazole 20 mg oral capsule
medications.sig: Take one 20 mg capsule by mouth once daily, 30 minutes before breakfast

document_references.description: Telemedicine follow-up note documenting 3-month leflunomide efficacy assessment for seropositive rheumatoid arthritis. Documents partial DMARD response (DAS28-CRP 4.4, improved from 4.9 but still moderate disease activity), declining grip strength despite modest symptom improvement, new NSAID gastropathy diagnosis, omeprazole initiation for gastroprotection, and plan to continue leflunomide for full 6-month trial with labs in 6 weeks and full reassessment in July 2022.

diagnostic_reports.description: CBC drawn 2022-04-01 at external lab. WBC 5.9, hemoglobin 14.6, platelets 246 — within normal limits. Hematocrit not individually reported.

CMP drawn 2022-04-01 at external lab. Only 5 of 14 components individually reported: glucose 100, creatinine 0.9, ALT 28, AST 26, albumin 3.9. LFTs stable and within normal limits. Overall assessment: normal.
